selection_criteria: small and safe — docs-only, checker-only, test-only, or CI-only
backward compatible — no API or CLI contract changes
no runtime trading impact — no broker, execution, safety, risk, or provider default changes
no new features — patch scope per Semantic Versioning 2.0.0
verified by evidence — reproducible from repo state, CI logs, or checker output
testable — no network or credentials required

candidates.title: Update v0.6.1-plan.md post-release status and resolved issues
candidates.source: docs/releases/v0.6.1-plan.md outdated post-release status; CI run 27038772473 green
candidates.acceptance_criteria: Doc accurately reflects current post-release state; known issues section moved to resolved.
candidates.reason: Outdated planning doc is misleading to operators.

candidates.title: Fix capability inventory version section labeling
candidates.source: docs/v0.6-capability-inventory.md labels strategy pack as v0.6.1 but it shipped in v0.6.0
candidates.acceptance_criteria: Section header corrected to reflect v0.6.0 release contents; no runtime changes.
candidates.reason: Misleading version labeling confuses patch scope.

candidates.title: Add post-release readiness check to CI quick-gate
candidates.source: ci.yml does not exercise check_v060_readiness.py --post-release; checker passes locally
candidates.acceptance_criteria: Post-release readiness step present in core-functional job; test asserts its presence.
candidates.reason: Ensures post-release validation runs on every push, preventing regressions.

candidates.title: Align GitHub release body trailing newline
candidates.source: docs/releases/v0.6.0.md and GitHub release body differ by one trailing newline
candidates.acceptance_criteria: Content is byte-identical except benign trailing whitespace.
candidates.reason: Benign formatting; no user impact. Defer to next doc-edit batch.

candidates.title: Checks-reference.md cross-link polish
candidates.source: checks-reference.md should reference new planning checkers
candidates.acceptance_criteria: New checker documented alongside other planning checkers.

candidates.title: Runtime diagnostics timeout guidance refinement
candidates.source: scripts/check_runtime_diagnostics.py and checks-reference.md already document timeout triage
candidates.acceptance_criteria: Guidance covers slow-machine estimates without weakening checks.
candidates.reason: Already sufficient; defer unless user reports confusion.

rejected.title: New broker adapters (Binance completion, CCXT enablement, IBKR implementation)
rejected.reason: New features, not bug fixes. Defer to v0.6.2 or later minor release.

rejected.title: Provider execution unlock or real LLM integration
rejected.reason: Runtime-sensitive, safety-critical. Explicitly out of patch scope.

rejected.title: PyPI publish
rejected.reason: Not a bug fix. Requires separate approval and process.

rejected.title: Dashboard frontend rewrite
rejected.reason: Large, new-feature work. Defer to minor release.

rejected.title: New strategy packs
rejected.reason: New features. Defer to minor release.

rejected.title: Autonomous trading or skill auto-activation
rejected.reason: Violates safety boundaries. Never acceptable in a patch.

safety_boundaries: src/atlas_agent/brokers/ — no new submit paths, no execution enabled by default
src/atlas_agent/risk/ — risk limits must not be weakened
No version bump to 0.6.1 in this batch
No docs/releases/v0.6.1.md release notes file created yet
No tag, GitHub release, or PyPI publish
non_goals: No new runtime features for v0.6.1
No approval queue or kill switch changes
No automatic skill activation or learning execution
No PyPI publish in this batch
